name: Calumet, Inc. /DE
business: Calumet manufactures, formulates and markets a diversified slate of specialty branded products and renewable fuels to customers across a broad range of consumer-facing and industrial markets.

exposures.sentence: In our Specialty Products and Solutions segment, we manufacture and market a wide variety of solvents, waxes, customized lubricating oils, white oils, petrolatums, gels, esters, and other products.

In our Montana/Renewables segment, we process a variety of geographically advantaged renewable feedstocks into renewable diesel, sustainable aviation fuel, and renewable naphtha that are distributed into renewable markets in the western half of North America.
In our Performance Brands segment, we blend, package and market high performance products through our Royal Purple, Bel-Ray, and TruFuel brands.
MRL is a leader in North America’s energy transition and one of the largest Sustainable Aviation Fuel producers in the western hemisphere.

On January 10, 2025, MRL and the U.S. Department of Energy (the DOE), as guarantor and loan servicer, executed a Loan Guarantee Agreement (the DOE Loan) for a $1.44 billion guaranteed loan facility to fund the construction and expansion of the renewable fuels facility owned by MRL.
Our MaxSAF expansion project is expected to deliver 120 to 150 million gallons of annualized SAF production by the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: MaxSAF expansion project expected to deliver 120-150 million gallons annualized SAF production
catalysts.sentence: Our MaxSAF expansion project is expected to deliver 120 to 150 million gallons of annualized SAF production by the second quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Issuance of $405.0 million 9.75% Senior Notes due 2031
catalysts.sentence: On January 12, 2026, the Partnership and Finance Corp. issued $405.0 million aggregate principal amount of 2031 Notes.

catalysts.event: Ninth Amendment to Credit Agreement entered into
catalysts.sentence: On January 23, 2026, the Company entered into the Ninth Amendment to the Third Amended and Restated Credit Agreement.

catalysts.event: Announced definitive agreement to sell Royal Purple industrial assets
catalysts.sentence: On February 28, 2025, the Company announced that it entered into a definitive agreement with a wholly owned subsidiary of Lubrication Engineers, Inc., a portfolio company of Aurora Capital Partners, to sell assets related to the industrial portion of its Royal Purple business, for $110.0 million, subject to certain customary adjustments.
